name: arXiv Reader
description: Read and analyze arXiv papers. Fetch full LaTeX source, list sections, or extract abstracts from any arXiv paper by ID.
author: Prismer Team

tools.name: arxiv_fetch
tools.description: Fetch the full flattened LaTeX source of an arXiv paper, ready for LLM analysis

remove_comments.description: Strip LaTeX comments from source (default: true)

figure_paths.description: Replace figure content with file paths only (default: false)

tools.name: arxiv_sections
tools.description: List all sections and subsections of an arXiv paper

tools.name: arxiv_abstract
tools.description: Extract just the abstract from an arXiv paper
